ead.archdesc:
======= RMA01464Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity records10-5-1464Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
November 20162B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
womstThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:00:26 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity records
Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity
10-5-1464
7.1 cubic feet. 7.1 cubic feet.
1971-1982. Minutes, reports, and records. Advisory Board minutes and reports and other records of the office. Collection material in English 2073526
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 2016
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2016
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, May 2017
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The Office of Equal Opportunity handled diversity, disability, sexual harassment and other inclusion issues. The director reported to the Vice President of Human Resources. The functions of this office were changed to the Office of Workforce Diversity and Inclusion (now the Department of Inclusion and Workforce Diversity) and Student Disability Services in 1999.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Advisory Board minutes and reports and other records of the office.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Affirmative Action Related Materials Boxes 1-4, 7
Plans
Proposals
Academic Appointments
Other Materials
Series II. Campus Building Construction Boxes 4, 6-7
Series III. Reports & Surveys Boxes 1, 4, 7
Series IV. Publications Box 2
Series V. Administrative Materials Boxes 1-2, 4, 7
Series VI. Sexual Harassment Related Materials Boxes 4, 7-8
Cite As:
Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity Records, #10-5-1464. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Affirmative action programs. Cornell University -- : Employees.
